title: TSA-SD Aviation CIP Control Family 3 — DCS / BHS / AOC continuous-monitoring detection-coverage heat-map
exclusions: Excludes test/lab assets. Excludes accepted-risk assets in `aviation_detection_risk_lookup`.
evidence: Saved search `UC-22.56.14` archived every 6 hours to `audit_evidence` with `tsa_sd_clause="TSA-SD-1542-21-02-s3.3"`.

compliance.assurance_rationale: Aviation continuous monitoring requires coverage across DCS, BHS, AOC, aerobridge, NOTAM-relevant systems. 'Partial' because BHS embedded systems often lack EDR support.
compliance.controlObjective: Proves AOC / DCS / BHS / aerobridge assets are detection-instrumented or have documented compensating coverage.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence`, the `TSA Aviation Detection Coverage` dashboard.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Disable EDR on a DCS workstation. UC-22.56.14 MUST flag within 6 hours.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Re-enable EDR or pin compensating control. UC-22.56.14 MUST NOT escalate.

dataSources: Aviation asset register (KV Store `aviation_facility_asset_lookup`). EDR coverage feed (Microsoft Defender for Endpoint, CrowdStrike Falcon). Claroty CTD aviation extension. Honeywell building-systems telemetry (`honeywell:bms:metric`).
app: Splunk Enterprise Security (Splunkbase 263), Splunk Add-on for CrowdStrike FDR (Splunkbase 5573), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Defender ATP (Splunkbase 4824).

splunkbaseApps.name: Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Defender for Endpoint

spl:
| inputlookup aviation_facility_asset_lookup
| eval needs_detection = if(aviation_in_scope=true AND (criticality IN ("critical","high")), "true", "false")
| where needs_detection="true"
| join type=left asset_id [search (sourcetype="crowdstrike:falcon:event" OR sourcetype="mscs:wd:atp:device") | stats latest(_time) as last_telemetry by host_id | rename host_id as asset_id]
| lookup aviation_detection_risk_lookup asset_id AS asset_id OUTPUT risk_id risk_until
| eval detection_status = case(
    isnotnull(last_telemetry) AND last_telemetry > now()-86400, "covered",
    isnotnull(risk_id) AND risk_until > now(), "risk_accepted",
    1=1, "gap")
| where detection_status="gap"
| table facility_id asset_id aviation_zone criticality detection_status
description: Reconciles aviation asset register with EDR/Falcon/Defender coverage; surfaces detection gaps.
value: TSA inspectors expect documented detection coverage for every aviation-critical asset.
implementation: (1) Populate `aviation_facility_asset_lookup`. (2) Populate `aviation_detection_risk_lookup`. (3) Schedule UC-22.56.14 every 6 hours. (4) Build the `TSA Aviation Detection Coverage` dashboard.
visualization: (Panel 1) Coverage by facility. (Panel 2) Gap-trend (30 days). (Panel 3) Risk-accepted expiry. (Panel 4) Top-10 facilities with gaps.
knownFalsePositives:
1. **BHS embedded controllers** — many BHS PLCs lack EDR support; pin in risk-accepted with compensating network monitoring.
2. **Aerobridge HMI panels** — vendor-locked; pin with compensating Claroty CTD passive monitoring.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `aviation_detection_risk_lookup`.
reviewer: TSA-SD Compliance SME Panel + CC + SOC Manager
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

Mirror UC-22.56.5 for aviation.

## Step 1 — Define aviation asset register

```ini
[aviation_facility_asset_lookup]
field.facility_id = string
field.asset_id = string
field.aviation_in_scope = string
field.aviation_zone = string
field.criticality = string
field.owner = string
```

## Step 2 — Schedule

```ini
[UC-22.56.14: TSA Aviation Detection Coverage]
cron_schedule = 9 */6 * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -6h@h
dispatch.latest_time = now
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.56.14,reg=TSA-Surface,clause=TSA-SD-1542-21-02-s3.3
alert.severity = 4
```

## Step 3 — Runbooks

**`detection_status=gap` on critical aviation asset**: investigate within 1 hour; deploy EDR or compensating control within 7 days.

## Step 4 — Troubleshooting

- **Vendor agent restrictions**: some BHS / DCS vendors prohibit EDR; document the prohibition + compensating control.

**TSA-specific failure modes**:
- **Joint-use airports**: airport authority + airlines + ground handlers may dispute responsibility; assign per-asset owner.
grandmaExplanation: Every important airport and airline computer must have a 'guard' watching for cyber attacks. We map who has guards and who doesn't, every six hours.
